Notes for Digital History 4/6/26

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(tidytext) 
#library(readtext)
#library(widyr)
#library(SnowballC)

tiny_corpus <-data.frame(
    doc_id = c("FDR_1933", "Lincoln_1863"),
    text = c("The only thing we have to fear is fear itself", "We have a government of the people, by the people, and for the people")
)

tiny_corpus %>% 
    unnest_tokens(word, text) %>% 
    anti_join(stop_words) %>%
    count(doc_id, word, sort=TRUE) %>% 
    bind_tf_idf(word, doc_id, n) %>%
    arrange(desc(tf_idf))
    
    #pivot_wider(names_from = word, values_from = n, values_fill = 0)

```
